MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
PAUL J. SMOOT, Esq.,LAW OFFICE OF PAUL J. SMOOT, (650) 548-0900 for Plaintiff John Griffin
HUNTER W. SIMS III, Esq., Deputy City Attorneys, (415) 554-3859, hunter.sims@sfcityatty.org, for Defendants CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,
SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER HUTCHINGS, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER OCRETO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER WONG.

Court provides it's tentative ruling to counsel by email the morning of today's hearing. All counsel confirms receipt of the Court's tentative ruling.

Court disclosure is made to parties. No obejctions are made.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICERS HUTCHINGS, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER OCRETO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER WONG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is "DENIED"

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that tracks the Court's tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/SRB)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
PAUL J. SMOOT, Esq.,LAW OFFICE OF PAUL J. SMOOT, (650) 548-0900 for Plaintiff John Griffin
HUNTER W. SIMS III, Esq., Deputy City Attorneys, (415) 554-3859, hunter.sims@sfcityatty.org, for Defendants CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,
SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER HUTCHINGS, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER OCRETO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER WONG.

Court disclosure is made to parties. No obejctions are made.

No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICERS HUTCHINGS, SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER OCRETO and SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER WONG'S Motion To File Under Seal.

Defendants' unopposed notice of motion to file under seal is granted. The proposed order shall recite the factors set out in CRC 2.550(d).

Court to review submittted proposed order.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/SRB)
